pr.title: Record: Pre-Enrichment + Encoder Recurrence + XSA + SmearGate + BigramHash (val_bpb=1.1629)

output.summary: Applies BigramHash+SmearGate-powered GELU pre-enrichment and encoder-only depth recurrence before the decoder with XSA on the final layers.
techniques: GELU pre-enrichment with BigramHash+SmearGate embedding expansion
U-Net encoder passes run twice with RMS-normed recurrence
XSA on final layers to subtract self-value projections
